texto: Anders looked up and saw Rik’s chocolate eyes. Even though they were brown, a closer look revealed a blue corona around the dark, almost mahogany brown irises. He’d seen a piece of agate like that once on a dig; a perfect marriage of brown and blue in the depths of a broken stone.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Caraway Carter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “Anders looked up and saw Rik’s chocolate eyes. Even though they were brown, a closer look reveale…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, agate, eyes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e reflexao-noturna.
